item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Oven-grilled Danish chicken – Juicy chicken pieces marinatedwith smoked paprika and thyme, served with caramelized sweet potatoes. Toppedwith creamy feta, ruby-red pomegranate seeds, and fresh parsley. Accompaniedby a rich garlic dressing on the side (2, 6, 11, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Crispy roasted pork belly – Perfectly cooked with a goldencrust, served with sweet adobo-agave carrots and crispy taco-roasted potatoes.Topped with smoked paprika popcorn and fresh tomato salsa (15). GREEN DISH: Pan-fried Karl Johan mushrooms – Juicy mushrooms with umami,prepared in the same way as the pork belly. Served with adobo-agave carrots,taco-roasted potatoes, smoked paprika popcorn, and tomato salsa (15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Slow-braised veal shank – Fall-off-the-bone tender meat, simmered in arobust stock with root vegetables and herbs. Served with creamy split peas,soft potatoes, and curly parsley. (10, 15) GREEN DISH: Poached tofu – Gently cooked in an aromatic broth with thyme, bay leaf,and cinnamon. Served with split peas, potatoes, and a sprinkle of fresh herbs.(7)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Ramsløk-marinated turkey cuvette – succulent and aromatic, marinated infresh ramsløk and lemon. Served with a fresh potato salad with dill, chervil,and a light vinaigrette on last year’s apple cider (11, 13, 15). GREEN DISH: Tahini-marinated cauliflower – roasted cauliflower with nutty tahini andlemon, served with creamy hummus, herb potato salad, and apple cidervinaigrette (8, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Line-caught fish of the day, served with pasta tossed in dill pesto, tomatoes,and red onions, accompanied by fried beets (1+3+6). GREEN DISH: Grilled portobello mushroom, served with pasta tossed in dill pesto, tomatoes,and red onions, accompanied by fried beets (1+6).
